title: Angular Initializr — Web Scaffolding Tool for Angular
description: SPA that replicates and extends the Spring Initializr experience for the Angular ecosystem. Generates fully configured Angular projects (v14–v21) with package.json, angular.json, tsconfig and production-ready folder structure. Supports 10 optional features: standalone components, routing, SSR, NgRx Store + Effects, Angular Material, HTTP interceptors, ESLint + Prettier, Font Awesome, environments and Cypress e2e. Automatically resolves version compatibility between Angular, TypeScript, zone.js, Jasmine/Karma and third-party dependencies. Embedded code editor (CodeMirror 6) with syntax highlighting for TS, Angular HTML, SCSS, JSON and Markdown with light/dark themes. Packages and downloads as .zip directly in the browser using JSZip — 100% client-side, no backend.

title: Serviobra — Corporate Landing Page
description: Corporate landing page commissioned by a private client in the construction and industry sector. Main goal: digitalize the company's presence and generate commercial leads through a high-impact visual experience. Modern architecture with Next.js 15 App Router and React 19, structured in strategic sections: animated hero with background image, value proposition, services catalog, competitive differentiators, client testimonials, and contact form. Entry and scroll animations managed with Framer Motion 12, achieving smooth transitions that reinforce the premium brand perception. Style system built entirely with Tailwind CSS v4, ensuring fully responsive design for mobile, tablet, and desktop. Global state managed with Zustand 5. Delivered to production via continuous deployment on Vercel.

title: Lift Builder — Strength Training App
description: Cross-platform mobile fitness application focused on strength training. Allows users to create and follow personalized training programs, log sessions, monitor progress, and track body weight. Includes a coaching module that enables trainers to manage and track their clients directly from the app. Developed the full architecture: PostgreSQL schema design with RLS, offline-first system with local SQLite, Supabase integration with query memoization, multi-role coaching module, and build pipeline for iOS and Android.

title: ever-cli — Frontend Scaffolding CLI
description: Command-line tool to automate component, service, module, and frontend architecture creation. Generates code following established patterns, runs bundle analysis, and applies custom linting. Published on npm with Angular, React support and custom plugins via config.

title: Weight Progress Tracker — iOS App
description: Native iOS application for personal weight tracking, goal management, and progress visualization. Built with Swift 5 and SwiftUI following MVVM architecture. Features include weight logging, custom goals with milestone tracking, interactive progress charts with Swift Charts, push notification reminders, multi-language support, gamification with achievements, and dynamic theme system. Data persisted locally with Core Data; reactive state managed via Combine.

title: EV Spot Map
description: A modern and visually stunning application that displays electric vehicle charging points on a 3D map. It provides detailed information about charging stations, including kW power, connector types, and availability.

title: Micro-Frontends Architecture
description: Micro-frontends architecture with Module Federation, enabling multiple teams to work independently on different application domains. Shell application orchestrates 4 micro-frontends with shared dependencies, remote lazy loading, and independent deployment per team.

title: @ever/reactive-store — State Management Library
description: Reactive state management library for Angular and modern JS frameworks. Minimalist API with typed selects, computed properties, devtools integration, and automatic persistence. Only 3.2kb gzipped. Published on npm with tree-shaking, 100% test coverage and full documentation.

title: Luck
description: Luck is a platform for creating raffles as content creators, improving public communication and delivering prizes.

title: Design System & Component Library
description: Comprehensive design system with color tokens, typography, spacing, and reusable components. Documented with Storybook, published as npm package with tree-shaking, light/dark themes, WCAG AA accessibility, and automated documentation with Chromatic.

title: inWork
description: InWork is a web platform SPA for job searching, where users register as seekers or companies posting offers.

title: Bundle Analyzer CLI
description: CLI tool for analyzing frontend application bundles. Generates visual reports by chunk size, detects duplicate dependencies, identifies code-splitting opportunities, and suggests automatic optimizations. Compatible with Webpack, Vite, and Esbuild.

title: Real-Time Analytics Dashboard
description: Real-time analytics dashboard featuring interactive charts, WebSocket-powered live data feeds, and an optimized component architecture with lazy loading. Includes dark mode, advanced filters, data export, and an ultra-responsive UX with smooth 60fps animations.

title: ngx-ever-components - Angular Library
description: ngx-ever-components is a modern library of UI components for Angular, designed to enhance application interfaces while simplifying development time.

title: ngx-ever-components - Documentation
description: Official documentation for the ngx-ever-components library, with installation guide, usage, and detailed documentation for each component.

title: The front-end guide
description: A web platform designed to teach everything about front-end development, from basic fundamentals to advanced and senior-level concepts.

title: AI Driver
description: AI Driver is a Hybrid Mobile App for Android/iOS developed with OpenAI's API for driving license theoretical tests.

title: Fasfu Burgers
description: Fasfu Burgers is a real-time pick-up delivery application created for Fasfu Burgers restaurant.

title: Node.js REST API — Auth & Permissions
description: Complete backend API with JWT authentication, granular roles and permissions, rate limiting, schema validation, and structured logging. Hexagonal architecture with PostgreSQL + Prisma ORM, Redis caching, E2E tests and auto-generated OpenAPI documentation. Dockerized with CI/CD.

title: AI Decisions
description: AI Decisions is a Hybrid Mobile App for Android/iOS with OpenAI's API that evaluates user decisions and provides optimal choices.

title: AI StoryBooks
description: AI StoryBooks is a Web Application with OpenAI API that creates AI-generated stories from user descriptions.

title: AI Chat - English/Spanish Learning
description: AI Chat is a Hybrid Mobile App for Android/iOS with OpenAI's API for learning English through AI conversations with real-time correction.

title: Web Performance Monitor
description: Web performance monitoring tool that analyzes Core Web Vitals (LCP, FID, CLS), bundle size, and loading metrics. Dashboard with metric history, automatic alerts when scores drop, and optimization suggestions with estimated impact.

title: AI Calories
description: AI Calories is a Hybrid Mobile App for Android/iOS with OpenAI API for managing calorie intake with AI assistance.

title: Bash Routing
description: Bash Routing is a creative Web SPA controlled entirely through a web-based terminal with commands.

title: Quick Weather
description: Quick Weather is a Hybrid Mobile App for Android/iOS showing current temperature and 6-day forecast.

title: EVERCODE
description: EVERCODE is a landing page presenting a technology solutions company.

title: EVERCODE Services
description: EVERCODE Services is a landing page for EVERCODE's technology services.

title: Dummy Store
description: Dummy Store is a product sales prototype for a technology company.

title: Besign Invest
description: Besign Invest is a creative landing template.

title: Vanderbilt
description: Vanderbilt is a website for a springs business in Quito, Ecuador.
